class.name: PackedDataContainerRef
class.deprecated: Use [method @GlobalScope.var_to_bytes] or [method FileAccess.store_var] instead. To enable data compression, use [method PackedByteArray.compress] or [method FileAccess.open_compressed].
class.brief_description: An internal class used by [PackedDataContainer] to pack nested arrays and dictionaries.

method.name: size
method.description: Returns the size of the packed container (see [method Array.size] and [method Dictionary.size]).
